channel.title: Gastronauts
channel.description: Latest releases from Gastronauts on Dropout.tv

item.title: Let's Get Physical
item.description:
Chefs Jennifer Felmley, Amanda Palomino, and Saransh Oberoi make the coldest meal for Kendahl, Cameron, and John.

Duration: 43:09

Tags: Gastronauts, jordan myrick, food, cooking, competitions, eating, chaos, kendahl landreth, cameron esposito, john milhiser, jennifer felmley, chef jen, amanda palomino, saransh oberoi

item.title: A Bone-afide Delight
item.description:
Chefs Max Rappaport, Irene Walton, and Joi Fowler create char-jewelry boards for Amanda, Tommy, and Angela.

Duration: 42:02

Tags: Gastronauts, jordan myrick, food, cooking, competitions, eating, chaos, amanda lehan-canto, tommy bowe, angela giarratana, smosh, max rappaport, irene walton, joi fowler
